proves: UX Lab #tau renders a distinct Fresh ANSWER Browser Proof panel backed by Tau's fresh-answer-browser-route manifest.

The API normalizer fails closed unless the source manifest is ok, mocked=false, live=true, contains /api/memory/intent HTTP 200, contains /api/memory/answer HTTP 200, and contains required visible answer assertions.
The visible panel preserves the prior fail-closed /api/memory/answer 502 run separately from the successful ANSWER-route proof.
